# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch snapshot configuration

# Define snapshot repository
repositories:
  - type: s3
    name: s3-repository
    settings:
      bucket: my-snapshot-bucket
      region: us-east-1

# Schedule automatic snapshots
automate:
  cron: "@daily"
  repository: s3-repository

# Define snapshot configurations
indices:
  - index: my-index
    snapshots:
      - name: daily-snapshot
        schedule:
          cron: "@daily"

# Restore snapshot
restoring:
  snapshot: daily-snapshot
  index: my-index

# Configure role for snapshot operations
roles:
  - name: snapshot-operator
    cluster_permissions:
      - "cluster:monitor"
      - "cluster:manage_snapshot"

# Assign role to user or group for automated snapshots
users:
  - name: snapshot-user
    roles:
      - snapshot-operator
